nodes.name: 休恩半岛
nodes.summary: 休恩半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Orange-billed lorikeet、Emperor bird-of-paradise、Wallace's fairywren等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: Black-sided robin
nodes.summary: Black-sided robin（Black-sided robin，学名 Poecilodryas hypoleuca），主要分布于休恩半岛，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Volume II | publisher = Dove Publications | location = Queensland | pages = 190–92 | isbn = 978-0-9590257-1-2 | oclc = 153651608 }} The black-sided robin is found across New Guinea from the Huon Peninsula west to the western limits of West Papua and West Papuan Islands, although is absent from the transfly region in the south

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits predominantly lowland rainforests and swamp forests from sea level to
